steps.title: Identify the stated purpose
steps.content: The passage directly states that archaeologists hope to use scents “to better understand ancient rituals, trade, social hierarchies, and medicine.”

steps.title: Match the explanation to the correct answer
steps.content: Choice B says archaeologists “believe the scents could illuminate important aspects of ancient life” — “illuminate” (shed light on) is exactly what “better understand” means, and it aligns with the specific topics the passage names. Choices A, C, and D each introduce things the passage never mentions or narrow the goal incorrectly. That matches choice B — B is correct.
